meta.title: V1 Baseline Evaluation Pack
meta.desc: Microsoft-curated baseline compliance evaluation pack. 9 evaluator categories mapped to EU AI Act articles. Only high-priority agents run these evals.

sqlite.query: SELECT id as '#', category, evals, mode, regulation FROM eval_categories ORDER BY id

card_data.pack_summary: Default Compliance Evaluation Pack (V1 Baseline). Evals run on sampled production traces for high-priority agents. Target: 20 evaluators across 9 categories. Customer-authored evals default to LLM mode.
